## pa

### Sense 1: lexicon

- **Pronunciation:** `PA`
- **Part of speech:** particle
- **Definition:** past action
- **Register/status:** grammar; accepted
- **Domains:** daily-life
- **Literal:** grammatical particle: tense
- **Example:** Na pa mar dev.
- **Corpus:** common (10 attestations); tracks: daily-dialogues, literary-poetic; examples in daily-052, daily-508, poetic-034, poetic-510, poetic-537

### Sense 2: particle

- **Pronunciation:** `PA`
- **Part of speech:** particle:tense
- **Definition:** past action
- **Register/status:** tense; accepted
- **Domains:** daily-life
- **Literal:** Place before the verb for action before the speech moment.
- **Example:** Na pa mar dev.
- **Corpus:** common (10 attestations); tracks: daily-dialogues, literary-poetic; examples in daily-052, daily-508, poetic-034, poetic-510, poetic-537

## paaaral

- **Example:** Na paaaral.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `PAD-WED`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** place, arena, or field where this root is enacted: print, printed page, reproduction
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** media-communication, law-governance, ritual-spiritual, art-beauty
- **Root family:** `PD`; Speech; print, printed page, reproduction; print, publication page, reproduced written form
- **Pattern:** place
- **Literal:** P-D root, place suffix -wed
- **Example:** Nel pat ad pad-wed.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `PALAT-KET`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** record, archive, log, or written evidence of: appeal, higher review
- **Register/status:** technical; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, economics-provision, travel-place
- **Root family:** `PLT`; Law/civic life; appeal, higher review; appeal, higher review, judgment re-opened under rule
- **Pattern:** record
- **Literal:** P-L-T root, record suffix -ket
- **Example:** Kat palat-ket.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `PANAC-TEL`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** instrument, tool, medium, or interface for: to pension, provide after labor, or fund elder support
- **Register/status:** technical; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, economics-provision, travel-place
- **Root family:** `PNC`; Law/civic life; pension, earned future provision; pension, earned future provision, elder labor memory
- **Pattern:** instrument
- **Literal:** P-N-C root, instrument suffix -tel
- **Example:** Na ban bi panac-tel.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `PAPALAN-LEK`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** doctrine, theory, or explanatory frame of: application, submitted request
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, economics-provision, travel-place
- **Root family:** `PPLN`; Law/civic life; application, submitted request; application, submitted request for standing, service, permit, or admission
- **Pattern:** doctrine
- **Literal:** P-P-L-N root, doctrine suffix -lek
- **Example:** Papalan-lek lek e rih.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)
